task_objective: Unify isTracked implementation by removing local duplicate code in index.tsx, delegating to LudusaviStateStore, maintaining debug logs via optional callbacks, and verifying with expanded static checks.
design_decisions: Removed duplicate isTracked helper definition in src/index.tsx.
Delegated isTracked calls in index.tsx to ludusaviStore.isTracked.
Added onMatch and onMiss callback parameters to LudusaviStateStore.isTracked to keep it decoupled from the plugin's global log helper while preserving identical debug logging behavior.
Removed unused 'normalize' function import from index.tsx.
Expanded static test coverage to inspect both ludusaviState.tsx and index.tsx for unoptimized Set iteration.

results.red_test: test_frontend_state_store_optimization_no_array_from_in_loop failed because index.tsx still contained the unoptimized Array.from loop
